# 

> A JavaScript Library for Dimensionality Reduction.

## API
- [Annoy](classes/Annoy.md): Annoy class
- [BallTree](classes/BallTree.md): BallTree class
- [CURE](classes/CURE.md): CURE class
- [DisjointSet](classes/DisjointSet.md): DisjointSet class
- [FASTMAP](classes/FASTMAP.md): FASTMAP class
- [Heap](classes/Heap.md): Heap class
- [HierarchicalClustering](classes/HierarchicalClustering.md): HierarchicalClustering class
- [HNSW](classes/HNSW.md): HNSW class
- [ISOMAP](classes/ISOMAP.md): ISOMAP class
- [KDTree](classes/KDTree.md): KDTree class
- [KMeans](classes/KMeans.md): KMeans class
- [KMedoids](classes/KMedoids.md): KMedoids class
- [LDA](classes/LDA.md): LDA class
- [LLE](classes/LLE.md): LLE class
- [LSH](classes/LSH.md): LSH class
- [LSP](classes/LSP.md): LSP class
- [LTSA](classes/LTSA.md): LTSA class
- [Matrix](classes/Matrix.md): Matrix class
- [MDS](classes/MDS.md): MDS class
- [MeanShift](classes/MeanShift.md): MeanShift class
- [NaiveKNN](classes/NaiveKNN.md): NaiveKNN class
- [NNDescent](classes/NNDescent.md): NNDescent class
- [OPTICS](classes/OPTICS.md): OPTICS class
- [PCA](classes/PCA.md): PCA class
- [Randomizer](classes/Randomizer.md): Randomizer class
- [SAMMON](classes/SAMMON.md): SAMMON class
- [SMACOF](classes/SMACOF.md): SMACOF class
- [SQDMDS](classes/SQDMDS.md): SQDMDS class
- [TopoMap](classes/TopoMap.md): TopoMap class
- [TriMap](classes/TriMap.md): TriMap class
- [TSNE](classes/TSNE.md): TSNE class
- [UMAP](classes/UMAP.md): UMAP class
- [XMeans](classes/XMeans.md): XMeans class
- [EigenArgs](interfaces/EigenArgs.md): EigenArgs interface
- [ParametersAnnoy](interfaces/ParametersAnnoy.md): ParametersAnnoy interface
- [ParametersBallTree](interfaces/ParametersBallTree.md): ParametersBallTree interface
- [ParametersCURE](interfaces/ParametersCURE.md): ParametersCURE interface
- [ParametersFASTMAP](interfaces/ParametersFASTMAP.md): ParametersFASTMAP interface
- [ParametersHierarchicalClustering](interfaces/ParametersHierarchicalClustering.md): ParametersHierarchicalClustering interface
- [ParametersHNSW](interfaces/ParametersHNSW.md): ParametersHNSW interface
- [ParametersISOMAP](interfaces/ParametersISOMAP.md): ParametersISOMAP interface
- [ParametersKDTree](interfaces/ParametersKDTree.md): ParametersKDTree interface
- [ParametersKMeans](interfaces/ParametersKMeans.md): ParametersKMeans interface
- [ParametersKMedoids](interfaces/ParametersKMedoids.md): ParametersKMedoids interface
- [ParametersLDA](interfaces/ParametersLDA.md): ParametersLDA interface
- [ParametersLLE](interfaces/ParametersLLE.md): ParametersLLE interface
- [ParametersLSH](interfaces/ParametersLSH.md): ParametersLSH interface
- [ParametersLSP](interfaces/ParametersLSP.md): ParametersLSP interface
- [ParametersLTSA](interfaces/ParametersLTSA.md): ParametersLTSA interface
- [ParametersMDS](interfaces/ParametersMDS.md): ParametersMDS interface
- [ParametersMeanShift](interfaces/ParametersMeanShift.md): ParametersMeanShift interface
- [ParametersNaiveKNN](interfaces/ParametersNaiveKNN.md): ParametersNaiveKNN interface
- [ParametersNNDescent](interfaces/ParametersNNDescent.md): ParametersNNDescent interface
- [ParametersOptics](interfaces/ParametersOptics.md): ParametersOptics interface
- [ParametersPCA](interfaces/ParametersPCA.md): ParametersPCA interface
- [ParametersSAMMON](interfaces/ParametersSAMMON.md): ParametersSAMMON interface
- [ParametersSMACOF](interfaces/ParametersSMACOF.md): ParametersSMACOF interface
- [ParametersSQDMDS](interfaces/ParametersSQDMDS.md): ParametersSQDMDS interface
- [ParametersTopoMap](interfaces/ParametersTopoMap.md): ParametersTopoMap interface
- [ParametersTriMap](interfaces/ParametersTriMap.md): ParametersTriMap interface
- [ParametersTSNE](interfaces/ParametersTSNE.md): ParametersTSNE interface
- [ParametersUMAP](interfaces/ParametersUMAP.md): ParametersUMAP interface
- [ParametersXMeans](interfaces/ParametersXMeans.md): ParametersXMeans interface
- [Comparator](type-aliases/Comparator.md): Comparator type alias
- [InputType](type-aliases/InputType.md): InputType type alias
- [Metric](type-aliases/Metric.md): Metric type alias
- [QRDecomposition](type-aliases/QRDecomposition.md): QRDecomposition type alias
- [version](variables/version.md): version variable
- [bray_curtis](functions/bray_curtis.md): bray_curtis function
- [canberra](functions/canberra.md): canberra function
- [chebyshev](functions/chebyshev.md): chebyshev function
- [cosine](functions/cosine.md): cosine function
- [distance_matrix](functions/distance_matrix.md): distance_matrix function
- [euclidean](functions/euclidean.md): euclidean function
- [euclidean_squared](functions/euclidean_squared.md): euclidean_squared function
- [goodman_kruskal](functions/goodman_kruskal.md): goodman_kruskal function
- [hamming](functions/hamming.md): hamming function
- [haversine](functions/haversine.md): haversine function
- [inner_product](functions/inner_product.md): inner_product function
- [jaccard](functions/jaccard.md): jaccard function
- [k_nearest_neighbors](functions/k_nearest_neighbors.md): k_nearest_neighbors function
- [kahan_sum](functions/kahan_sum.md): kahan_sum function
- [linspace](functions/linspace.md): linspace function
- [manhattan](functions/manhattan.md): manhattan function
- [max](functions/max.md): max function
- [min](functions/min.md): min function
- [neumair_sum](functions/neumair_sum.md): neumair_sum function
- [norm](functions/norm.md): norm function
- [normalize](functions/normalize.md): normalize function
- [powell](functions/powell.md): powell function
- [qr](functions/qr.md): qr function
- [qr_householder](functions/qr_householder.md): qr_householder function
- [simultaneous_poweriteration](functions/simultaneous_poweriteration.md): simultaneous_poweriteration function
- [sokal_michener](functions/sokal_michener.md): sokal_michener function
- [wasserstein](functions/wasserstein.md): wasserstein function
- [yule](functions/yule.md): yule function
